opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tool detected means after-hours HVAC leads go unanswered.
opportunities.observation: Boise customers needing emergency heating or AC service will call competitors who offer instant booking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI scheduling bot on their site to capture and confirm appointments 24/7 without staff.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and phone-only contact means zero lead data is being stored.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked call from a Boise homeowner is lost with no record to follow up or analyze.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording with automatic CRM entry to log every caller, intent, and outcome.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected despite serving a seasonal Boise HVAC market with 187 past customers.
opportunities.observation: Without automated reminders, Prime loses recurring tune-up revenue each spring and fall season.
opportunities.fix: Set up AI-driven seasonal email and SMS campaigns to prompt past customers to book maintenance visits.
